messages.content:
Bot1 <Event>: I have picked up:
- 1 Stone Sword
- 1 Bow
- 24 Arrow
- 1 Leather Tunic

arguments.name: equip_best_armor
arguments.description: Equip the best available armor pieces from inventory into their appropriate armor slots for improved damage reduction.

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created equip_best_armor and executed it with {"allowLeather":true,"replaceWeaker":true}. <DONE>: Equipped Leather Tunic to torso.

Bot1 <Event>: Multiple new hostile mobs are approaching:
- zombie id 16 is 3.1 blocks away
- zombie id 17 is 2.2 blocks away

arguments.message: Two zombies are within 3 blocks on our west side; I will engage the closest with sword while you avoid friendly fire and hit the other from the flank.

arguments.name: attack_nearest_hostile
arguments.description: Equip the best melee weapon available, face the nearest hostile mob, and attack it until it dies or until health drops below a safe threshold, using short strafes to maintain spacing and avoid surrounding allies.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "Two zombies are within 3 blocks on our west side; I will engage the closest with sword while you avoid friendly fire and hit the other from the flank."

arguments.name: eat_food_if_hungry_or_hurt
arguments.description: If food can be eaten and the bot is hurt or hunger is below full, equip the best available food and eat once to restore hunger/saturation for healing; otherwise do nothing.

messages.content: Me <NEW ACTION>: Created eat_food_if_hungry_or_hurt and executed it with {"minHealth":18,"minFood":20,"preferredFood":"bread","allowRiskyFoods":false,"consumeDurationMs":1850,"restorePreviousHandItem":true}. <STARTED>: Started eating Bread because health or food is below threshold.

arguments.message: I’m critically low at 7.9 with zombies on me; pull them off me while I retreat and recover.

arguments.name: kite_nearest_hostile
arguments.description: Retreat directly away from the nearest hostile mob while facing it, maintaining a preferred distance, sprinting if possible, avoiding other hostiles and allied players, and stopping early if a safe gap is reached or health becomes critically low.

messages.content: Me <MESSAGE to Bot2>: "I’m critically low at 7.9 with zombies on me; pull them off me while I retreat and recover."
